text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Engineering Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact produced by this methodology, paired with a valid + invalid example.

example.note: Conforms to the schema; required fields present, enums respected.
Missing required fields and / or violates pattern constraints.

forbidden.pattern: Top-level object missing any of the required fields.
Free-form additional properties not listed in the schema.
Enum field value outside the declared set.

text.reference: Validates an artefact against this schema.
